overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City at night. The character moves from a neon-lit main street into a covered alleyway, interacts with an NPC near a parked car, then exits back to the bustling downtown sidewalk approaching a street vendor.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from open street to covered alley entrance

events.description: moving from open neon-lit street into darker covered alleyway with metal shutters

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk into a covered alleyway with metal shutters and concrete barriers

entered.detail: metal roof structure covering the alleyway
closed corrugated metal shutters on storefronts
futuristic white sports car parked in the alley
large concrete blocks lining the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks from a neon-lit city street into a darker covered alleyway. Metal shutters line the left side while concrete barriers appear on the right. A white sports car is parked ahead in the alley, visible under the roof structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered alley with parked vehicle and NPC interaction

events.description: slowing down and approaching the NPC standing near the white sports car
other pedestrians walk through the alley, passing by the parked car

agents.ego_description: circling around and observing an NPC standing near the white sports car in the alley

notable_agents.action: standing near the white sports car, appears to be waiting or posing

segments.scene_description: In the covered alley, the character approaches an NPC standing beside a white sports car under a spotlight. The environment is enclosed with metal shutters and concrete barriers. Other pedestrians occasionally pass through the alley as the character observes the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: main city street with neon billboards and vehicle traffic

events.description: exiting the covered alley back onto the open main street with bright neon signage
vehicles driving past on the street to the right

agents.ego_description: walking out of the alley and onto the busy downtown sidewalk with tall buildings and neon lights

notable_agents.action: dark colored car driving along the street

entered.detail: tall buildings covered with bright neon advertisements and holographic displays
skyscrapers with illuminated windows rising above the street

segments.scene_description: The character exits the dark alley into the bright neon-lit main street. Tall buildings with massive digital billboards dominate the skyline. Vehicles drive past on the right while pedestrians walk along the wide concrete sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown sidewalk with street vendor stall

events.description: approaching the street food vendor stall with colorful umbrella

agents.ego_description: walking along the neon-lit sidewalk approaching a street food vendor under a colorful umbrella

notable_agents.action: vendor standing at the food stall under a colorful umbrella

entered.detail: street food stall with colorful umbrella, neon lighting, and cooking equipment

segments.scene_description: Walking along the bustling downtown sidewalk, the character approaches a street food vendor stall illuminated by neon lights under a colorful umbrella. Other pedestrians walk in opposing directions while vehicles continue to pass on the adjacent street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a vibrant neon street into a secluded urban alleyway before returning to the bustling downtown core. It begins as the character leaves the bright city lights to enter a darker covered alley lined with metal shutters and concrete barriers. As the camera moves deeper into the enclosure, the character approaches an NPC standing beside a white sports car illuminated by a single spotlight. The scene then shifts as the character exits the shadows and emerges back into the glare of the main street, where massive digital billboards tower over the skyline. Finally, the camera follows the character along the wide concrete sidewalk past flowing traffic toward a neon-lit street food vendor under a colorful umbrella.
